nasb.text: So when they had gone about through the whole land, they came to Jerusalem at the end of nine months and twenty days.

esv.text: So when they had gone through all the land, they came to Jerusalem at the end of nine months and twenty days.

cnv.text: 以後，他們走遍了全地，過了九個月又二十天，就回到耶路撒冷。

ccb.text: 他们花了九个月零二十天的时间，走遍全国，最后回到耶路撒冷。
